creator: tucoghby@hotmail.com
text:
I purchased freebsd 4.4 10disk set with book at best buy and installed them when evry thing started to not work any more so i ran nortan anti virus and it could not fix it on the hard drive or the cd's i talked to best buy and they said it was a manufacturers problem so how do i get my money back or how do i get a new set of ten that doesn't have bloodhound.MBF bios virus on it??? hummmmm :D please help!!!

Fix: 

get rid of the bios related virus on the cd's and refomat both hard drives
How-To-Repeat: use the disks i have and install it..
